payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Ornate dark reddish-brown wooden chair with a carved, pierced backrest and solid seat; front legs and stretcher visible, sides slightly edge-cropped — medium-sized dining/side chair approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"ornate dark-red wooden chair edge-cropped","long_description":"Ornate dark reddish-brown wooden chair with a carved, pierced backrest and solid seat; front legs and stretcher visible, sides slightly edge-cropped — medium-sized dining/side chair approximately 1.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark reddish-brown wood","ornate carved backrest","pierced cutout patterns","solid seat","front legs visible","leg stretcher","slight gloss finish","edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
